title: erythroxylum virgultosum
intro: Erythroxylum virgultosum, also known as the Guayusa tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae. The Guayusa tree is native to the Amazon rainforest and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erythroxylum virgultosum include improved digestion, reduced stress levels, and increased energy, making it a popular herbal remedy among locals. Erythroxylum virgultosum is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it can also be found in some herbal supplements and tinctures.
